sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108223" key="u(pogu/pwnes" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπογύπωνες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n108223.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a sort of dancers,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:104" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.104</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
